task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Search for the WeChat article using official WeChat search or Sogou WeChat search"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Obtain the URL of the target WeChat article"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Send an HTTP request to fetch the article's webpage content using a mobile user-agent"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Parse the HTML content using BeautifulSoup"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "Extract the title and main content from the parsed HTML"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "Handle exceptions such as login walls, access restrictions, or dynamic content"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "Extract the main title of the article"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "Extract all headings (h1-h4) and bold text from the article content"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "Save the extracted title and headings into a file"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "searchResult"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "urlInput"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "htmlResponse"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "parsedHTML"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "contentExtraction"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node3", "type": "retryOnError"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "extractTitle"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "extractHeadings"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "saveTitle"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "saveHeadings"}]}
